articles.title: PM Modi Chairs High-Level Meeting on National Security
articles.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi chaired a high-level meeting with senior officials to review the national security situation. The meeting focused on border management, internal security, and counter-terrorism measures. Senior ministers and top military officials attended the comprehensive security briefing.

articles.title: Supreme Court Issues Guidelines on Electoral Bond Disclosures
articles.summary: The Supreme Court issued fresh guidelines regarding electoral bond disclosures, directing political parties to submit detailed financial records within 30 days. The bench emphasized transparency in political funding and warned of contempt proceedings for non-compliance. The order is expected to have significant implications for campaign financing.

articles.title: G20 Leaders Agree on New Climate Finance Framework
articles.summary: G20 nations reached a landmark agreement on a new climate finance framework, pledging $500 billion annually to help developing nations transition to clean energy. The deal includes mechanisms for technology transfer and capacity building. India played a pivotal role in negotiations, securing favorable terms for emerging economies.

articles.title: ISRO Successfully Tests Reusable Launch Vehicle in Bay of Bengal
articles.summary: ISRO successfully conducted the third test of its Reusable Launch Vehicle over the Bay of Bengal, achieving all mission objectives including autonomous landing. The RLV technology demonstrator completed a series of complex maneuvers before touching down precisely at the designated landing strip. This marks a major milestone toward cost-effective space access.

articles.title: RBI Holds Repo Rate Steady, Projects 7% GDP Growth for FY27
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of India kept the repo rate unchanged at 6.25% in its latest monetary policy meeting while projecting GDP growth of 7% for FY2026-27. The MPC cited stable inflation and robust domestic consumption as key factors. The central bank also announced measures to boost credit flow to the MSME sector.

articles.title: Neeraj Chopra Wins Gold at Doha Diamond League with 89.4m Throw
articles.summary: Olympic champion Neeraj Chopra dominated the Doha Diamond League with a stunning 89.4-metre throw to clinch gold, his best performance of the season. Chopra surpassed his rivals by over two metres, showcasing exceptional form ahead of the World Athletics Championships. He dedicated the victory to his fans and support staff.

articles.title: IIT Delhi Develops AI Model to Predict Monsoon Patterns with 94% Accuracy
articles.summary: Researchers at IIT Delhi have developed an AI-powered model capable of predicting monsoon patterns with 94% accuracy up to 45 days in advance, significantly better than existing models. The system uses deep learning to analyze satellite data, ocean temperatures, and historical weather patterns. It could transform agricultural planning for millions of Indian farmers.

articles.title: NEP 2020 Implementation: 85% Schools Now Offer Vocational Courses
articles.summary: The Education Ministry announced that 85% of schools across India now offer vocational education courses under the National Education Policy 2020 implementation, up from just 42% two years ago. The courses cover coding, artificial intelligence, entrepreneurship, and traditional crafts. Student enrollment in vocational streams has grown by 60% year-on-year.

articles.title: Bollywood Blockbuster Crosses Rs 600 Crore at Box Office in Opening Week
articles.summary: A high-budget Bollywood action thriller crossed the Rs 600 crore mark at the domestic box office within its opening week, becoming the fastest Hindi film to achieve this milestone. The film received critical acclaim for its technical achievements and performances. The producers have already announced a sequel based on the overwhelming response.
